faq.q: Is GovFund a Australia government agency?
faq.a: No. GovFund is a private consultancy. We are NOT a government agency. We help businesses navigate government schemes.
Yes. The eligibility scan is free and takes 60 seconds. Full application support is available through our paid plans.

faq.q: What if I'm not eligible for anything?
faq.a: The scan will tell you exactly that — no cost, no obligation. But most businesses qualify for at least 3-5 schemes they didn't know about.

outreach_script:
Hey everyone 👋

I built a free tool that scans all government funding schemes in Australia and tells you what your business qualifies for.

R&D Tax Incentive: 43.5% refundable offset for small companies

It covers grants, loans, tax incentives, rebates, wage subsidies — everything. Takes 60 seconds.

I've been sharing it with Australia business owners and the average business qualifies for 8-12 schemes they didn't know existed.

No catch. No spam. Just a free scan.

Drop a comment if you want the link or DM me directly.
